name: io.github.beepboop2025/seiche
title: Seiche — funding-stress terminal
description: Funding-stress early warning for US money markets, as agent tools: current stress regime, forward event odds, nearest historical analogs, and an honest backtest — built entirely from free public data (Fed H.4.1, NY Fed, OFR repo, Treasury cash).

environmentVariables.name: SEICHE_MCP_PUBLIC
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose only the free public tools (the conclusion, PROOF scoreboard, analogs, data health).
